_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Identify tools/hardware used to extract/analyze/capture memory and disk images.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of computer vision task taxonomy, including image classification, object detection, segmentation, pose estimation, and generation, and the architectures appropriate for each.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI AI domain. AI-K-013 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-K-012 (TF, cosine: 0.370), DQ-K-011 (DQ, cosine: 0.365).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.7/10 (raw 0.372). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [analyze, capture, disk, extract, hardware, identify] vs WIDAI-only terms [appropriate, architectures, classification, computer, detection, estimation] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.842 (P=0.841, R=0.843). Balanced P/R — the 9-word DCWF element and 22-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (98.4%). "Identify tools/hardware used to extract/analyze/capture memory and disk images." and "Knowledge of computer vision task taxonomy, including image classification, obje" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.389 ≈ STS 0.372 (gap 0.017). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [none] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 3.1%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [analyze, capture, disk, extract, hardware, identify]. WIDAI terms: [appropriate, architectures, classification, computer, detection, estimation].
